case_title: EDMUND CHANG VS. HELENA DUGGAN et al

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DUGGAN, HELENA
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR PAUL BEACH KUHL.

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR FEB-11-2008. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-24-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. DEC-07-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE FEB-21-2008.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANG, EDMUND SERVED JUL-12-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUGGAN, HELENA

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-23-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
